title: Bitcoin nearing late stages of bear market: Jamie Coutts, Real Vision
summary: Real Vision chief crypto analyst Jamie Coutts said it's far too early to call $1 million by 2030, but he's confident Bitcoin could climb up to $250,000 over the next couple of years.

title: Ethereum climbs 3% on tokenization boom: Can bulls push ETH price past $1,800?
summary: Despite strong tokenization gains and institutional accumulation, weak onchain and derivatives data leaves ETH vulnerable to a $1,700 retest.

title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
